title: How to add extra-column to RDF_QUAD with access from sparql query?
key_bug_features: Adding extra column to RDF_QUAD for SPARQL queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rdf_quad_extended (resourceUri VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255), spUri VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY (resourceUri, predicate));
INSERT INTO rdf_quad_extended (resourceUri, predicate, value, spUri) VALUES ('http://example.org/resource1', 'http://example.org/predicate1', 'value1', 'http://example.org/spUri1');
INSERT INTO rdf_quad_extended (resourceUri, predicate, value, spUri) VALUES ('http://example.org/resource2', 'http://example.org/predicate2', NULL, 'http://example.org/spUri2');
SELECT * FROM rdf_quad_extended WHERE spUri IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM rdf_quad_extended WHERE value IS NULL OR value = 'value1';
